parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO leads (
  email,
  first_name,
  last_name,
  source,
  lead_magnet_type,
  status,
  qualification_score,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.firstName }}',
  '{{ $json.lastName }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ $json.leadMagnet }}',
  'lead_magnet',
  35,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (email) 
DO UPDATE SET
  lead_magnet_type = COALESCE(leads.lead_magnet_type, '{{ $json.leadMagnet }}'),
  source = '{{ $json.source }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;
